<!-- Workspace-specific instructions for GitHub Copilot -->

## Project Setup

This is a Vite + React + Tailwind CSS portfolio project.

### Installation

```bash
npm install
```

### Development Server

```bash
npm run dev
```

### Build for Production

```bash
npm run build
```

## Project Structure

- `src/` - React components and styles
- `public/` - Static assets
- `index.html` - HTML entry point
- `vite.config.js` - Vite configuration
- `tailwind.config.js` - Tailwind CSS configuration

## Key Files

- `src/Portfolio.jsx` - Main portfolio component
- `src/App.jsx` - App wrapper
- `src/main.jsx` - React entry point

## Customization Guide

To update portfolio content, edit the data arrays in `src/Portfolio.jsx`:
- `experience` - Work history
- `skillGroups` - Skills by category
- `projects` - Project list
